ItacPersonItem.Notes: Guerrini was the author of several comedies where he signed as Accademico Infuriato di Roma. These texts are not in British Library collections: L`ingiusto castigo (1637); La legge d`amore (1641); Il trionfo d`amore (n.d.);
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
